Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
AC: 8
DEX: +4 WIS: +4
SV COLD: +2 SV MAGIC: +2
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
AC: 8
DEX: +4 WIS: +4
SV COLD: +2 SV MAGIC: +2
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Tint:

Source:Live

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
Battle Master Ska`tu

Chardok

Send a correction
Post Comment
HLF Druid
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2003 at 11:56 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362014850
View User Forum
68 posts
Got the Gauntlets for 200p and the arms for 500p. Pretty good prices on the Innoruuk server.
My HLF Druid looks great in them. They're a dark purple. Not sure how that goes with My mostly Green onsomble HeHe but like the others above I was getting tired of wearing 5p (split paw) gloves on My 27 Druid, lol.
At least they look like something other than the GREEN everything turns out to be on a HFL Druid.
Freeky Man...lol
▲ Page top
Looks
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 6:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252990572
25 posts
Also if you want to see the look of them go to fashion luclin and look for Nathsar BP... Thats a picture of someone in Full nathsar with GEBS... so go check it out!

Edited, Wed Apr 17 20:44:45 2002
▲ Page top
Bough for looks bud...
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 6:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252990572
25 posts
Hey everone, The Nathsar series armor is not bought for the stats... They have some Wis wich make it good for the druids who like the Nathsar look and effect... Also the Nathsar Series is MONK usuable... the legs have 12ac (i think) and i know any monk would like 12ac on a leg PLUS a sweet *** effect... So dont say these SUCK like every Other nubee who want nice *** armor for cheap...

49Warr of Fennin Ro

Edited, Wed Apr 17 07:16:09 2002
▲ Page top
rare? who cares
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2002 at 12:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777396987
10 posts
they may be rare, but who cares? they SUCK, they're worth at the most maybe 40, 50pp. Rygorr gloves arent very good, but they have 12 ac and stats for only around 50pp. these things arent worth the trouble trying to buy em.

# Mar 17 2002 at 1:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250645882

I have been looking around in the usually selling places, asking folks buying other Nathsar items, and such, but I cannot find these for sale. I'm looking to buy them on the Seventh Hammer.
▲ Page top
288pp my ass
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 5:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761566162
20 posts
These things are MUCH rarer (on Torvo) then the bracers and vambraces. The BP and legs are NEVER for sale. I paid 500pp for my gaunts, first pair I'd ever seen for sale. Won't wear in battle (Grey Flesh Gloves) but damn my cleric looks good with the vambraces, bracers, and gaunts on. Now for the legs and BP...sigh
▲ Page top
Nathsar Drop Area
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2002 at 3:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758193659
7 posts
Nathsar BP drops ONLY in the royals area from random mobs, leggings drop from Underboss Myli'ki, Observer Aq'touz drops the bracer, Watch Sergeant Riz'oul drops the vambraces, gauntlets are random from any mob
▲ Page top

__DEL__1591762777867

How a little more info, name of the mob, his level, and general location would be nice.

Wow
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 10:46 PM Rating: Default
DyllwinDW
View User Forum
Scholar
212 posts
Hail All,
Finally a set of gloves that a Halfling Druid can wear to get rid of those Split Paw gloves. I've been wearing mine for so long they must be in tatters by now =) Nice AC, Dex and the extra wis point will come in handy, not to mention the bonus of the saves... These are gonna cost a pretty peny for a while, so best to get yourself to Chardok if possible for your own pair (I know I will be soon)

Dyllwin Dalewalker
Preserver 56th Season
An Rach
<Cazic-Thule>

Dyllwin Dalewalker
Heirophant of the 100th Season

RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 4:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760093425
4 posts
Coldain skin gloves(AC 12, 6wis 6 int, 9 sta, 20hp/mana, all/all) are halfling druid usable, i believe. Now I don't know what your budget is like, but the coldain gloves are a vast improvement. On E`Ci they sell for around 6k last time i checked and are fairly common. Don't get me wrong..these gloves are nice if you are either very close to 200 wis, or cannot afford the Coldain gloves..but I'd thought I would make a suggestion :) thanks

*edit* 54 wanderer...

Just curious what these look like. I'd like this as a upgrade to my current gloves, but would honestly prefer to have good looking gauntlets instead of another set of leather gloves.

# Oct 22 2001 at 3:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769635067
4 posts
Nathsar armor looks like a royal blueish armor with a silky texture. Unique as far as i know, very very awesome. Seen pieces on a human and wood elf...both were extremely stylish
